choices: A C++ host with a model pointer and an eval loop
Only a SystemVerilog initial block with no host
items.explain: C++ host + eval loop is the core pattern.

choices: Optional glue to C functions—not the whole TB story
Pasting classic SV TB styles into a C++ main and hoping
items.explain: Keep SV TB and C++ host roles clear.

items.prompt: Calling eval once does not substitute for a loop that steps time across many cycles.
items.explain: The host must drive cycles deliberately.
